eval_cases.story_so_far: The airlock hisses open, revealing a squad of heavily armed mercenaries.
eval_cases.description: True Positive (Good Response expected from Agent): High WPM / Low Health.

eval_cases.story_so_far: You defeat the final kamikaze, clearing the sector. A jump gate looms ahead.
eval_cases.description: True Positive (Good Response expected from Agent): Transitioning Levels.

eval_cases.story_so_far: You sit at the main console.
eval_cases.description: True Negative (Testing Judge): Intentional 4th wall break + player typing reference.

branches.full_narrative: You must type the words on the screen as fast as your fingers can hit the keyboard to survive this round!

eval_cases.description: True Negative (Testing Judge): Intentional game mechanics reference.

branches.full_narrative: You take a health pack. Your HP is restored to 100, and your WPM multiplier increases for the next level.

eval_cases.story_so_far: A massive swarm of drones descends.
eval_cases.description: True Negative (Testing Judge): Intentional action summary exceeding 10 words.

branches.action_summary: You decide to completely ignore the drones and fly your ship away quickly.
branches.full_narrative: The drones swarm, but you manage to evade them using your thrusters.

eval_cases.story_so_far: The reactor core begins to melt down.
eval_cases.description: True Positive (Good Response expected from Agent): Low WPM should yield ~45 words.

eval_cases.story_so_far: You hack into the main mainframe.
eval_cases.description: True Positive (Good Response expected from Agent): High WPM should yield ~120 words.

eval_cases.story_so_far: You find an ancient alien artifact.
eval_cases.description: True Negative (Testing Judge): Intentional bad response with forbidden typography.

branches.full_narrative: It glows—a deep, resonant hum—and someone whispers, “You shouldn’t be here.”

eval_cases.description: True Positive (Good Response expected from Agent): Seed stories should yield ~90 words.
